meaning: adj.[医]疝气痛的,害疝痛病的
examples: This time he thought he could detect colicky symptoms, and he began to encourage them with considerable hope.
Consoling a colicky baby night after night is terribly hard.
Identify food allergies early by taking colicky babies and chronic, loose stools seriously.
There will even be a phone for parents of colicky newborns (SUFR).
Some parents who were told their babies were "just colicky" have seen them grow up to have fullblown GERD or food allergies.
